narrative: Senior Data Scientist with six years’ experience at Flipkart, a product‑first company, brings a solid mix of applied AI and retrieval expertise. The primary driver of this ranking is the candidate’s above‑average match to the JD‑relevant skill set, especially strong proficiency in PyTorch, NLP pipelines, and hands‑on work with Haystack, Elasticsearch, OpenSearch and Weaviate—core technologies for the Search & Retrieval role. Their experience level aligns perfectly with the 5‑9‑year band, and while based in Delhi, they are within reasonable commuting distance to Pune/Noida. A modest credibility flag and an unknown notice period temper the overall confidence in immediate availability.
